fidelity-studio-content-assistant.note: OAuth-protected Fidelity Studio Content Assistant MCP endpoint. Sign in with the email account Fidelity Studio invited to the CMS. Client-specific guidance is returned by get_project_context after authentication.

resend.note: Official Resend hosted MCP endpoint. Sign in with the authorized client team or account for newsletter templates, contacts, audiences, broadcasts, test sends, and delivery operations.
